A SHORT LIVED AND WEAK EF0 TORNADO WITH MAXIMUM WIND SPEEDS OF 70 MPH ASSOCIATED WITH TROPICAL DEPRESSION FLORENCE TOUCHED DOWN IN THE PRE-DAWN HOURS JUST EAST OF THE WAYNE EXECUTIVE JETPORT RUNWAY. THE TORNADO WAS ONLY ON THE GROUND FOR A SHORT AMOUNT OF TIME, BUT DID CAUSE SOME MINOR STRUCTURAL DAMAGE TO A HOME AND DESTROYED SEVERAL OUTBUILDINGS BEFORE LIFTING. ESTIMATED TIME... 3:55 AM EDT - 3:57 AM EDT MAXIMUM EF-SCALE RATING...EF0 ESTIMATED MAXIMUM WIND SPEED... 70 MPH MAXIMUM PATH WIDTH...100 YARDS PATH LENGTH...0.4 MILES.
